# HDFC Bank UPI RuPay Credit Card
  * Seamless UPI payments with a virtual card
  * Earn CashPoints on your UPI spends
  * Link your card to any UPI App of your choice


[Apply on My Cards (opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/?redirect_url=%2F/dualcard?type=rupayCard%3FfeatureType%3DrupayCard&type=rupayCard&productType=CC&cardNum "Apply on My Cards")
![HDFC Bank UPI Rupay Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/hdfc-bank-upi-rupay-credit-card-desktop-banner?fmt=webp)

UPI convenience, Credit card privileges – All in one.

###  Detailed savings break-up
Get 120 cashpoints on Groceries, Restaurant & PayZapp transactions, & also get cashback.
₹ 360
Get 80 cashpoints on Utility transactions, & also get cashback.
₹ 240
Get 40 cashpoints on Apparel, Electronics, Other Spend, & also get cashback.
₹ 120
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/?redirect_url=%2F/dualcard?type=rupayCard%3FfeatureType%3DrupayCard&type=rupayCard&productType=CC&cardNum "Apply Now")
More rewards than ever before
Transaction Benefits
  * 3% CashPoints on supermarket, groceries, dining spends, and PayZapp transactions*


Payment Benefits
  * 2% CashPoints on all utility payments & 1% CashPoints on all other spends*


Milestone Benefits
  * Renewal membership fee waived off by spending ₹25,000 and above in an annual year*


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/hdfc-bank-upi-rupay-credit-card#offers "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits
### CashPoint Benefits
  * 3% Cashpoints on Groceries, SuperMarket & Dining spends & PayZapp transactions
  * 2% Cashpoints on Utility bills
  * 1% Cashpoints on other spends (Excluding Rent, Wallet loads, EMI, Fuel, Insurance Payments & Government categories)
  * **Note:** The above benefits are applicable for both UPI as well as regular credit card spends. Click here for detailed [Terms & Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/hdfc-bank-upi-rupay-credit-card/Terms-and-Conditions-HDFC-Bank-UPI-RuPay-Credit-Card-27032025.pdf)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/hdfc-bank-upi-rupay-credit-card "View More")
![HDFC Bank UPI Rupay Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### UPI Benefits
  * Link your Virtual Credit card to any UPI app for secure and convenient transactions
  * Earn Cashpoints on your UPI transactions
  * Enjoy the convenience of Credit in UPI transactions


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/hdfc-bank-upi-rupay-credit-card "View More")
![HDFC Bank UPI Rupay Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Credit Benefits
  * Zero Fuel surcharge
  * Interest free period for 50 days
  * Renewal membership fee waived on spending of 25000/- and above in a year


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/hdfc-bank-upi-rupay-credit-card "View More")
![HDFC Bank UPI Rupay Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Enjoy Rewards on your UPI transactions just like 25 Lakh+ HDFC Bank card holders 
[Calculate Now (opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/?redirect_url=%2F/dualcard?type=rupayCard%3FfeatureType%3DrupayCard&type=rupayCard&productType=CC&cardNum "Calculate Now")
![Millennia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Documents required to get you started
Identity Proof
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photographs


Address Proof
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID


Income Proof
  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals)
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR)
  * Form 16
  * Bank statements


## Fees and Charges
Know more about the joining/renewal fees and other charges here.
[Check Now ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/hdfc-bank-upi-rupay-credit-card/fees-and-charges "Check Now")
## Apply Now in 3 Easy Steps:
**If you are an existing HDFC Bank Card holder:**
  * Visit [MyCards](https://mycards.hdfc.bank.in/)
  * Check eligibility of the UPI RuPay Credit Card
  * Click on [“Apply Now”(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/?redirect_url=%2F/dualcard?type=rupayCard%3FfeatureType%3DrupayCard&type=rupayCard&productType=CC&cardNum) and get your card issued instantly


**If you do not have any HDFC Bank Credit Card:**
  * Apply for any Visa / Mastercard / Diners credit card from HDFC Bank website as your Primary Credit Card
  * Ask to get an additional UPI RuPay Credit card with your Primary Credit Card
  * Get your UPI RuPay Credit Card when your Primary Card is issued


[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?Channel=DSA&DSACode=XVBP&SMCode=U2303&LGCode=DGPI&LCCode=MSAD&LC2=CHN&msclkid=d464e6cc6bf21a6c52008f638975f04e&utm_source=bing&utm_medium=cpc&utm_campaign=Search-HDFC_CC&utm_term=get%20credit%20card%20online&utm_content=Ad%20Group%201#nbb "Apply Now")
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Control via MyCards
  2. ### Card Reward & Redemption Program
  3. ### Redemption Limit
  4. ### Application Channels
  5. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions*


###  Card Control via MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/), a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of UPI RuPay HDFC Bank Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up Card PIN 
  * Manage card controls like online spends, contactless transactions
  * View Transactions/Download e-statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/Re-issue card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, manage, set PIN and card controls for Add-on card


![Redemption Limit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Card Reward & Redemption Program 
**Redemption Value:**
  * CashPoints as per the product feature will be credited in the form of Cash Back, which can be redeemed by the customer against their statement balance (1 CashPoint = ₹0.25)
  * Reward Points Redemption against each category can be redeemed at the below value:

  
| 1 Reward Point Equivalent to  |  
| --- |  
| Cashback against statement  | ₹0.25  |  
| Unified SmartBuy  | ₹0.25  |  
| Product Catalogue  | ₹0.25  |  
| Airmiles  | ₹0.25  |  
Click [here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/rupay-cc-on-upi) to know more about UPI purchases
[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/hdfc-bank-upi-rupay-credit-card/Terms-and-Conditions-HDFC-Bank-UPI-RuPay-Credit-Card-27032025.pdf) to know more about rewards
![Card Reward and Redemption](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Redemption Limit 
  * CashPoints can be redeemed up to 50% of the booking value for Flight and Hotel Bookings. The remaining amount will have to be paid with Credit Card.
  * Effective January 01, 2023
    * Reward points redemption for flights & hotel bookings are capped at ₹50,000/month
  * With effect from 1st February 2023,
    * Redemption is capped at up to 70% of product/Voucher value through Reward Points on select vouchers/products
  * A minimum of ₹500 statement balance is required for redemption


  * Unredeemed cashpoints will expire/ lapse after 2 years of accumulation


![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Application Channels 
If you are an existing HDFC Bank credit card holder:
  * **1. MyCards  
**You can quickly apply online by clicking [here(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/?redirect_url=%2F/dualcard?type=rupayCard%3FfeatureType%3DrupayCard&type=rupayCard&productType=CC&cardNum).
  * **2. PayZapp App  
**If you have PayZapp app, just head to the Credit Card section to get started. Don’t have it yet? Download PayZapp [here(opens in a new tab)](https://v.hdfcbank.com/payzapp/index.html?id=com.hdfcbank.payzapp&mc_id=pz-microsite&utm_source=PZ-Microsite&utm_medium=CTA&utm_campaign=PZ-Microsite-CTA&utm_id=PZ-Microsite&shortlink=pzmicrosite&c=PZ-Microsite&pid=PZ-Microsite&af_xp=social&source_caller=ui) and apply directly from your phone.  



If you don’t have any HDFC Bank credit card:
  * Apply for any Visa / Mastercard / Diners credit card from HDFC Bank website as your Primary Credit Card
  * Ask to get an additional UPI RuPay Credit card with your Primary Credit Card
  * Get your UPI RuPay Credit Card when your Primary Card is issued


![Redemption Limit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Most Important Terms and Conditions*

You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/cards/services) to access all important links related to your Credit Card.

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  How does a cardholder calculate cashpoints earned on monthly spends?
CashPoints are calculated on the spends made within the calendar month cycle and not basis statement cycle. Only settled transactions within the calendar month will be considered for CashPoints posting.
###  Can a UPI RuPay Credit Card be used for UPI?
Yes, RuPay Credit Cards can be seamlessly used for UPI transactions. Users can download and register on their preferred UPI app, such as PayZapp, GPay, PhonePe, Mobikwik, PayTM, BHIM, or Slice. By registering the UPI RuPay Credit Card using the Credit Card PIN, users can make UPI payments and leverage the associated benefits, combining the strengths of Credit Cards on UPI platforms. Additionally, this card allows cash withdrawals at ATMs, providing users with a comprehensive financial tool for various transactions.
###  How to set up a PIN for HDFC Bank UPI RuPay Credit Card?
Cardholder can set up a PIN for UPI RuPay Credit Card by calling IVR Toll number 1860 266 0333
**Steps for IVR:**
  * Call IVR Toll number 1860 266 0333 from your registered mobile number:
  * Enter the last 4 digits of the Cardholder credit card followed by hash (#)
  * Dial 1 to generate a Credit card PIN
  * Again Dial 1 when prompted to "Generate a One Time Password" (OTP) to Cardholder mobile as an SMS and enter the 6-digit OTP
  * On successful entry of OTP, the IVR will confirm successful validation and ask the cardholder to set the 4-digit PIN followed by the hash(#) key. If cardholder get disconnected at step# 4:- Redial the Toll number, after Step2 ….“Dial 2 to enter the 6 digit OTP
  * [Click here](https://v.hdfcbank.com/htdocs/common/generate_pin/create_pin.html) to know more.


###  How RuPay UPI Credit Card Works?
To enjoy the benefits of a UPI RuPay Credit Card, users need to set a UPI PIN. This PIN is essential for UPI registration, ensuring a secure link between the Credit Card and UPI functionalities. Once registered, users can make UPI payments using their Credit Cards, experiencing the dual advantage of both Credit Card benefits and UPI transactions.
###  What is RuPay UPI Credit Card?
RuPay UPI Credit Card combines the benefits of RuPay and UPI, offering a seamless fusion of credit card and UPI functionalities. This RuPay Credit Card for UPI serves as a versatile financial tool, allowing users to make secure transactions both as a Credit Card and through UPI platforms.
###  How to Apply for a UPI RuPay Credit Card?
**a. If you are an existing HDFC Bank credit card holder:**
  * **MyCards:** You can quickly apply online by clicking [here(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/?redirect_url=%2F/dualcard?type=rupayCard%3FfeatureType%3DrupayCard&type=rupayCard&productType=CC&cardNum)
  * **PayZapp:** If you have PayZapp app, just head to the Credit Card section to get started. Don’t have it yet? Download PayZapp [here(opens in a new tab)](https://v.hdfcbank.com/payzapp/index.html?id=com.hdfcbank.payzapp&mc_id=pz-microsite&utm_source=PZ-Microsite&utm_medium=CTA&utm_campaign=PZ-Microsite-CTA&utm_id=PZ-Microsite&shortlink=pzmicrosite&c=PZ-Microsite&pid=PZ-Microsite&af_xp=social&source_caller=ui) and apply directly from your phone


**b. If you don’t have any HDFC Bank credit card:**
  * Apply for any Visa / Mastercard / Diners credit card from HDFC Bank website as your Primary Credit Card
  * Ask to get an additional UPI RuPay Credit card with your Primary Credit Card
  * Get your UPI RuPay Credit Card when your Primary Card is issued


###  How can the cardholder know the delivery status of the UPI RuPay Credit Card?
Since the UPI RuPay Card is a virtual card, no physical card will be delivered. An SMS will be triggered to the cardholder once the UPI RuPay credit card is issued and cardholder can view the complete details on MyCards platform.
###  Is there any capping for CashPoints earned on a UPI RuPay Credit Card?
Please note that there is a calendar month capping on CashPoints accrued on the below-mentioned features.
  * Maximum capping for 3% CashPoints on groceries, supermarket, Dining & all PayZapp transactions is 500 Points 
  * Maximum capping for 2% CashPoints on utility spends is 500 points 
  * Maximum capping for 1% CashPoints on other spends is 500 points


###  Can UPI RuPay Credit Card be availed as a standalone or Fresh Credit Card?
No, the UPI RuPay Credit Card will be issued as an additional floater card only and not as a standalone card or fresh Credit Card.
###  What are the other benefits of the UPI RuPay Credit Card?
  * Interest-Free Credit Period: Avail up to 50 days of interest-free period on UPI RuPay Credit Card from the date of purchase (subject to the submission of the charge by the Merchant).
  * Rewards on UPI Spends: Cardholders can link UPI Credit Card in UPI Apps and earn cashpoints for UPI purchases


###  How to link/Register HDFC Bank UPI RuPay Credit Card in UPI Apps?
Step 1: Download/open UPI app and register UPI Rupay Credit Card using the credi
Step 2: Register UPI RuPay Credit Card in UPI apps by using credit card details & PIN.
Step 3: Make UPI payments using UPI RuPay Credit Card & enjoy Credit Card benefits even on UPI payments
Note: Cardholder need to setup credit card PIN before linking/registering the card in
UPI Apps.
To Know more about UPI transactions on HDFC Bank UPI RuPay Credit,
Refer link - [https://www.hdfcbank.com/personal/rupay-cc-on-upi](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/useful-links)
###  Will the cardholder get any surcharge waiver on fuel purchases done using UPI RuPay Credit Card via UPI mode?
There is no fuel surcharge applicable on UPI payments. Therefore, no fuel surcharge waiver will be provided, however w.e.f 1st Oct 2025, 1% fee will be levied on Fuel transaction exceeding Rs 15,000. Fee capped at Rs 4999 per transaction
###  As a cardholder I am not getting CashPoints on all spends, why so?
CashBack shall not be eligible for the following spends/transactions on the card,
  * Fuel spends
  * Cash advances
  * Payment of outstanding balances
  * Payment of card fees and other charges
  * All EMI spends (Merchant EMI/ Smart EMI / Dial an EMI etc)
  * Wallet spends
  * Rent payments
  * Government related spends


If a cardholder breaches the monthly cycle capping of the product features, then CashPoints shall not be rewarded for the spends done beyond the monthly capping.
###  How will a cardholder get cashback on EMI spends?
No. EMI spends shall not earn any CashPoints
###  What documents are required for a UPI RuPay Credit Card?
No document proof is required for applying UPI RuPay Credit card.
###  Cardholder did a transaction in the groceries, and supermarket category and didn’t get CashPoints as per the 3% cashback feature?
CashPoints of 3% will be calculated basis the Merchant Category Code (MCC) shared by the RuPay network. If in case the MCC is not available in the set-up, such transactions will not qualify for the benefit. Only Below mentioned MCCs will be considered for cashpoints posting Merchant category & MCC code: Grocery & supermarket 5411, Dining 5812, 5814
###  What are cashpoints?
CashPoints are an exclusive rewards metric system created by HDFC Bank for credit cardholders which can be used towards cashback redemption against the statement at the rate of 1 CashPoint = ₹0.25 for UPI RuPay Credit Card Holders.
Please note that CashPoints will be posted as reward points only.
###  Cardholder did a transaction in the utility category and didn’t get CashPoints as per the 2% cashback feature?
CashPoints of 2% will be calculated basis the Merchant Category Code (MCC) shared by the RuPay network. If in case the MCC is not available in the set-up, such transactions will not qualify for the benefit. Only 4900 Merchant Category code (MCC) as defined by RuPay Card Network is considered under utility spends
###  What are the key features of the UPI RuPay Credit Card?
  * 3% CashPoints on groceries, supermarket, dining & all PayZapp transactions 
  * 2% CashPoints on utility spends 
  * 1% CashPoints on other spends   
Except for fuel, rent payments, EMI spends, Govt related transactions and wallet/ gift /prepaid card loads & voucher purchase transactions.


###  Can the cardholder use UPI RuPay Credit Card for normal credit card Ecom transactions?
Yes, cardholders can use this card for normal Ecom purchases as well as UPI purchases.
###  Will the cardholder get cashpoints for UPI Purchases done Via UPI RuPay Credit Card?
Yes, Cardholder will earn cashpoints for both UPI spends as well normal credit card Ecom spends ( As per the maximum cashpoints capping mentioned in Question 1)
###  Can the cardholder opt for Physical HDFC Bank UPI RuPay Credit Card?
No, UPI RuPay Credit Card will be issued only as virtual card and no physical card will be issued.
###  What are the Fees and Charges applicable on the UPI RuPay Credit Card?
  * First Year Membership Fee of ₹99 + applicable taxes and renewal membership Fee of ₹99 + applicable taxes
  * Spend ₹25,000 in 12 months (Annual year) and get the renewal fee waived for the next renewal year.


**Goods and Services Tax (GST)**
  * Effective 1st July 2017, Goods & Services Tax (GST) is applicable on all fees, charges and interest transactions.
  * The applicable GST would be dependent on place of provision (POP) and place of supply (POS). If POP and POS are in the same state then applicable GST would be CGST and SGST/UTGST else, IGST.
  * GST for fee & charges / Interest transactions Billed on statement date will be reflected in next month's statement.
  * GST levied will not be reversed on any dispute on fee & charges/interest.


###  How can a cardholder use the CashBack earned?
  * CashBack is a CashPoints that can be redeemed against the statement balance at a rate of 1 CashPoint = ₹0.25, via net banking or offline redemption on flights, hotel bookings, and rewards catalogue at the SmartBuy rewards portal.
  * A minimum of 500 cashpoints is required for redemption.
  * Maximum of 50% of the booking value can be redeemed through CashPoints.
  * CashPoints are valid for 2 years from the date of accumulation.


###  What is the minimum transaction amount that is eligible for cashpoints under 3%, 2% & 1% features?
Minimum transaction amounts of ₹100 & above only are eligible for cashpoints posting for 3%, 2% and 1% features
###  Which UPI app allows Credit Card?
RuPay UPI Credit Card functionality is compatible with various UPI apps, offering users flexibility in choosing their preferred platform. Users can seamlessly link and use their RuPay Credit Card on popular UPI apps like PayZapp, GPay, PhonePe, Mobikwik, PayTM, BHIM, and Slice, enhancing accessibility and convenience.
###  When will the earned CashPoints be posted in the cardholder statement?
The total CashPoints earned in a cycle will be reflected in the subsequent statement of the cardholder.
###  How to use UPI RuPay Credit Card?
UPI RuPay Credit Card integrates Credit Card benefits with UPI transactions. Here's a step-by-step guide:
  * Download the UPI app such as PayZapp or PhonePe from the app store.
  * Link your UPI Rupay Credit Card to the UPI app and set your UPI PIN for transaction verification
  * Enjoy secure transactions and withdraw cash at the ATMs using UPI RuPay Credit Card.


###  Where can the cardholder view the UPI RuPay Credit card details?
Cardholder can view the UPI RuPay credit card in MyCards platform by logging in through a registered mobile number and can view the card details like 16-digit Credit Card number, CVV & Date of Expiry.
Note: The UPI RuPay Credit Card will be available in MyCards platform after the application is processed.
###  How many CashPoints will be earned if a cardholder spends through SmartBuy?
Spends done through SmartBuy shall not be eligible for CashPoints
